name: detectors: each TS detector completes <=5s on a 1000-file changeset (§2.2 perf requirement)
command: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "export const X${i}: number = ${i};" > "src/f${i}.ts"; done && for d in no-any exhaustive-unions type-test-coverage; do START=$(date +%s); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts" >/dev/null 2>&1; END=$(date +%s); ELAPSED=$((END-START)); [ $ELAPSED -le 5 ] || { echo "FAIL $d took ${ELAPSED}s" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
